_source: Bank-centric fingerprint match (ReginaVoiceMatcher.MatchBanks @score>=0.92) of BioRand regina.dc1 corpus to english/Sound/VOICE banks; user-confirmed method (docs/dc1/VOICE-DECODE-REPORT.md, VOICE-RANDO-PLAN.md §12.6).
_note: DC1 TARGET voice manifest, BioRand voice.json format (path -> {player,actor,kind}). Banks are RIFF/WAVE PCM mono 22050 8-bit .dat (§4). Regina banks come from the bank-centric fingerprint (MatchBanks @>=0.92, §12.6); entries with '_verified' are HUMAN by-ear corrections from data/dc1/voice-corrections.json (§12.8) that override the fingerprint — incl. the first supporting-cast (gail/rick) and the non-cast 'computer' (endgame results). Non-Regina actors map to VoiceActor.Unknown in the loader (not a Regina swap target). 'kind' omitted == dialogue. '_donor'/'_score' = fingerprint provenance.
_lock: Loaded by Dc1VoiceManifest.Load, locked by Dc1VoiceManifestTests. Regenerate Regina set via ReginaVoiceMatcherTests.Validate_BankCentric_* then the generator; ALWAYS re-apply data/dc1/voice-corrections.json afterwards.
_folderCuration: 2026-06-27 human folder-curation pass (voice-export/<actor>/): labelled the full DC1 cutscene cast from sorted WAVs. Entries with '_source: folder-curation 2026-06-27' are the curation additions; the original fingerprint+by-ear entries keep their _donor/_score/_verified. Non-cast machine voices 'computer'/'computer-lab' are recorded but map to VoiceActor.Unknown (not swap targets). The 19 'others' banks remain unlabelled by request.
